productDisplayName: Nike Men Dual Fusion ST 2 Black Sports Shoes
description: With plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike Dual Fusion ST 2 running shoe is perfect for runners who have a neutral to slightly overpronated gait. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who love those long walks.UpperSoft, single-layer mesh for breathable comfortPerforated, internal fit saddle work with lacing system for a comfortable, snug fitStrategically placed overlays for lightweight support to the midfootInternal heel counter works with the external heel overlays to offer absolute stabilityGilly lacing system for a supportive fit and to lock the foot in placeEVA sockliner offers plush comfort and performanceMidsoleDual-density phylon midsole with softer foam in the centre and firmer foam on the perimeter for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced supportMoulded piping on the firmer density foam to act as a crash pad for smoother transition from heelstrikeMildly cushioned footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs for maximum cushioning and optimal traction on various surfacesForefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motionShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
